items.description: Array of suggestion items with { label: string, value: any } structure

onChange.description: Callback fired when input value changes. Receives event object with value, name, and args

onSelect.description: Callback fired when a suggestion is selected. Receives the selected item value

onFilter.description: Callback for filtering items or loading async data based on input

maxSuggestions.description: Maximum number of suggestions to display (filters the items list)

debounceMs.description: Debounce delay in milliseconds before calling onFilter

loading.description: Show loading indicator in the input

emptyMessage.description: Message shown when no suggestions match

renderItem.type: (item: ListItem, index: number, isSelected: boolean, isHighlighted: boolean) => ReactNode

autoFocus.description: Auto focus the input on mount

id.description: HTML id attribute for the input

name.description: Name attribute for the input (used in forms)

args.description: Additional arguments passed to onChange/onSelect handlers

className.description: Additional CSS classes for the input
